name: claude-commit-ai
description: AI-powered git commit message generator using Claude AI

commands.title: Generate Commit Message with Custom Prompt

commitGenAI.cliPath.description: Path to Claude Code CLI executable (leave empty for auto-detection)

commitGenAI.apiKey.markdownDescription: Legacy Anthropic API key setting. Prefer `commitGenAI.anthropicApiKey` for new setups.

commitGenAI.anthropicApiKey.markdownDescription: Anthropic API key for Claude AI (`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`). Optional if using Claude Code CLI.

commitGenAI.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for the Claude API endpoint (`ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`). Leave empty to use the official Anthropic API endpoint.

commitGenAI.apiProvider.markdownDescription: API provider to use when `commitGenAI.preferredMethod` uses `api`.

commitGenAI.openAiApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI-compatible API key (`OPENAI_API_KEY`). Used when `commitGenAI.apiProvider` is `openai-responses`.

commitGenAI.openAiBaseUrl.markdownDescription: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (`OPENAI_BASE_URL`). Leave empty to use `https://api.openai.com/v1`.

commitGenAI.openAiModel.markdownDescription: Model name for the OpenAI-compatible Responses API.

commitGenAI.preferredMethod.description: Preferred method for generating commits: auto (try CLI first, then API), cli (Claude Code CLI only), or api (configured API provider only)

enumDescriptions: Use the model name from commitGenAI.customModelName
commitGenAI.model.description: Claude model to use for commit generation

commitGenAI.customModelName.markdownDescription: Custom Claude model name to use when `commitGenAI.model` is set to `custom`.

commitGenAI.multiLineCommit.description: Generate detailed multi-line commits with body and footer (conventional commits extended format)

enumDescriptions: Use staged changes if available, otherwise use all changes
commitGenAI.diffSource.description: Which changes to use for generating commit messages

commitGenAI.claudeCodeManaged.markdownDescription: Claude Code managed mode: Let Claude Code's haiku model generate commit messages with minimal intervention (only language hint provided). **Only works when preferredMethod is 'cli'**

commitGenAI.keepCoAuthoredBy.markdownDescription: Keep Co-Authored-By signature in commit message. **Only works in Claude Code managed mode**

commitGenAI.messageAutoCloseSeconds.description: Auto-close timeout for the success message in seconds. Set to 0 to disable auto-close.

commitGenAI.privacyMode.markdownDescription: Privacy mode: Restrict temporary prompt file permissions to owner-only (0600). When disabled, uses default permissions (0644). **Note: This option only takes effect on Linux/macOS. On Windows, file permissions are managed by the OS and this setting is ignored.**

enumDescriptions: Conventional Commits with scope - feat(auth): added user login
Type prefix only - feat: added user login
commitGenAI.commitStyle.markdownDescription: Commit message style format. Choose 'custom' to use your own prompt template.

enumDescriptions: Imperative mood (Git best practice) - 'add feature', 'fix bug'
commitGenAI.commitTense.markdownDescription: Tense/mood for commit subjects. **Imperative** (default) follows the official Git convention - the subject reads as a command (e.g. 'add login button'). **Past tense** describes what was done (e.g. 'added login button').

author: AnhNT
